description_long: This helicopter features a sleek, modern design with a streamlined fuselage and a prominent cockpit area. The main body is primarily white with gray and blue accents, and it is equipped with a large, four-bladed main rotor and a smaller tail rotor. The cockpit has multiple angular, tinted windows providing wide visibility, and the side doors and panels are detailed with various markings and insignias. The landing skids are robust, metallic, and reinforced with crossbars for stability. Additional details include external piping, antennae, and a visible registration number on the tail. The helicopter is accompanied by a separate, modular landing pad or equipment platform.
description: A modern, white and gray helicopter with blue-tinted cockpit windows, four main rotor blades, and sturdy landing skids, featuring detailed markings and a visible registration number.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angular cockpit windows, main rotor, and the modular landing pad beside the helicopter.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side door, external piping, insignias, and the full length of the landing skids.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, tail rotor, and the back of the landing pad.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cockpit profile, side markings, and the tail with registration number.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, straight main rotor blades made of composite or metal, colored dark gray with lighter tips and subtle markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: Present, with two blades in a cross configuration, mounted vertically at the end of the tail boom, colored gray with red and white tips.
attribute_landing_skids: Two parallel, tubular metal skids with a silver finish, reinforced by crossbars and angled supports for stability.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Five angular, blue-tinted cockpit windows arranged in a wraparound configuration, framed in dark material with no visible markings.
